mapper.select:
select dept_cd as code, concat(dept_nm, '(', dept_cd, ')') as name from mas_dept sd where 1=1 and use_yn = 'Y' and tree_level = 3
and 1 != 1
and sd.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd}
order by sd.ord_no asc
select plant_cd as code, concat(plant_nm, '(', plant_cd, ')') as name from sys_plant sp where 1=1 and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y'
select rank_cd as code, concat(rank_nm, '(', rank_cd, ')') as name from mas_rank mr where 1=1 and sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd}
